title: Student Management System
description: A local Java and MySQL database system featuring layered architecture, validated CRUD operations, and custom SQL reporting.

title: SpringMart
description: E-commerce API demo built with Spring Boot. Features RESTful endpoints, search, pagination, and Docker support, including a React frontend built using AI tools.

title: wrkout
description: Workout tracker built for gym-goers following a Push/Pull/Legs (PPL) split. Tracks workout progress and helps make training more structured and engaging.

title: Shreyan's Arc
description: Interactive DSA roadmap designed to filter out the noise of large question banks. Guides users through core problem-solving patterns in a structured sequence, also serving as a revision tool for technical interviews.

title: J-Void
description: Java-based DSA practice platform built for focused problem-solving. Integrates with the "Shreyan's Arc" roadmap and provides direct LeetCode links for quick submissions.

title: WealthWise
description: Custom portfolio website built for a financial advisor to establish an online presence, showcase services, and improve client outreach.
